zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thurston De Montfort於1120年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東時，他的父親Hugh de Montfort45歲，母親Adeline de Beaumont14歲。他於1145年與Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac在英國諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Thurston De Montfort于1120年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東时，他的父亲Hugh de Montfort45岁，母亲Adeline de Beaumont14岁。他于1145年与Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac在英国諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly East Anglia):
from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is of uncertain origin, probably a Norman form of the Old Norse personal name Þórsteinn, composed of elements meaning ‘Thor's stone’. It is now used fairly regularly as a given name, largely as a result of the fame of the film actor Dustin Hoffman ( b. 1937 ), who is said to have been named in honour of the less well-known silent film actor Dustin Farman ( 1870–1929 ).

variants.name: Thruston
meanings: English: metathesized form of   Thurston   1.

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thurston De Montfort was born in 1120, in Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Montfort, was 45 and his mother, Adeline de Beaumont, was 14. He married Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac in 1145, in Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1190, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thurston De Montfort est né en 1120, à Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Montfort, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Beaumont, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac en 1145, à Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1190, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thurston De Montfortが1120年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエグマントンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Montfortは45歳，母Adeline de Beaumontは14歳であった。1145年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエグマントンでLady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdacと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thurston De Montfort(이)가 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 그먼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Montfort(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline de Beaumont(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1145년 영국 노틴그함실르 그먼턴에서 Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thurston De Montfort родился в 1120 г. в местности эгмантон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Montfort было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Beaumont, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Juliane Beaudesert De Murdac в 1145 г. в местности эгмантон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1190 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
